tools.name: activeBoxScores.legacyBoxScoresActive
tools.description: This method returns box scores for all games that are either in-progress or have been updated within the last 30 minutes.

tools.name: allTeams.teamsAll
tools.description: Gets all teams, including pro bowl teams.

tools.name: areAnyGamesInProgress.areGamesInProgress
tools.description: Returns true if there is at least one game being played at the time of the request or false if there are none.

tools.name: boxScores.legacyBoxScores
tools.description: This method returns all box scores for a given season and week.

tools.name: boxScoresDelta.legacyBoxScoresDelta
tools.description: This method returns all box scores for a given season and week, but only returns player stats that have changed in the last X minutes.

tools.name: boxScoresDeltaV3.boxScoresDeltaV
tools.description: This method returns all box scores for a given season and week, but only returns player stats that have changed in the last X minutes. You can also filter by type of player stats to include, such as traditional fantasy players, IDP players or all players.

tools.name: byes.byeWeeks
tools.description: Get bye weeks for the teams during a specified NFL season.

tools.name: currentSeason.seasonCurrent
tools.description: Year of the current NFL season. This value changes at the start of the new NFL league year. The earliest season for Fantasy data is 2001. The earliest season for Team data is 1985. The earliest season for Fantasy data is 2001. The earliest season for Team data is 1985.

tools.name: currentWeek.weekCurrent
tools.description: Number of the current week of the NFL season. This value usually changes on Tuesday nights or Wednesday mornings at midnight ET.

tools.name: fantasyDefenseByGameByTeam.fantasyDefenseGameStatsByTeam
tools.description: Fantasy Defense Game Stats by Team

tools.name: fantasyDefenseBySeasonByTeam.fantasyDefenseSeasonStatsByTeam
tools.description: Fantasy Defense Season Stats by Team

tools.name: fantasyPlayers.fantasyPlayersWithAdp
tools.description: This method returns a comprehensive list of draftable fantasy football players, including QB, RB, WR, TE, K and DEF.  Players are sorted by ADP (AverageDraftPosition).

tools.name: fantasyPlayersIdp.idpFantasyPlayersWithAdp
tools.description: This method returns the top 300+ IDP Fantasy Players for the current or upcoming season, ordered by AverageDraftPositionIDP.

tools.name: gameStats.gameStatsBySeasonDeprecatedUseTeamGameStatsInstead
tools.description: Game stats for a specified season.

tools.name: gameStatsByWeek.gameStatsByWeekDeprecatedUseTeamGameStatsInstead
tools.description: Game stats for a specified season and week.

tools.name: lastCompletedSeason.seasonLastCompleted
tools.description: Year of the most recently completed season. this value changes immediately after the Super Bowl. The earliest season for Fantasy data is 2001. The earliest season for Team data is 1985.

tools.name: lastCompletedWeek.weekLastCompleted
tools.description: Number of the current week of the NFL season. This value usually changes on Tuesday nights or Wednesday mornings at midnight ET.

tools.name: playerGameRedZoneInsideFiveStats.playerGameRedZoneStatsInsideFive
tools.description: Player Game Red Zone Stats Inside Five

tools.name: playerGameRedZoneInsideTenStats.playerGameRedZoneStatsInsideTen
tools.description: Player Game Red Zone Stats Inside Ten

tools.name: playerGameStatsByWeekDelta.getOperation
tools.description: Player Game Stats by Week Delta

tools.name: playerSeasonRedZoneInsideFiveStats.playerSeasonRedZoneStatsInsideFive
tools.description: Player Season Red Zone Stats Inside Five

tools.name: playerSeasonRedZoneInsideTenStats.playerSeasonRedZoneStatsInsideTen
tools.description: Player Season Red Zone Stats Inside Ten

tools.name: rookies.playerDetailsByRookieDraftYear
tools.description: Player Details by Rookie Draft Year

tools.name: schedules.schedule
tools.description: Game schedule for a specified season.

tools.name: scores.scoresBySeason
tools.description: Game scores for a specified season.

tools.name: scoresByDate.getOperation
tools.description: Get game scores for a specified week of a season.

tools.name: scoresByWeek.getOperation
tools.description: Get game scores for a specified week of a season.

tools.name: simulatedBoxScoresV3.boxScoresVSimulation
tools.description: Gets simulated live box scores of NFL games, covering the Conference Championship games on January 21, 2018.

tools.name: simulatedScores.scoresByWeekSimulation
tools.description: Gets simulated live scores of NFL games, covering the Conference Championship games on January 21, 2018.

tools.name: teamGameStatsBySeason.teamGameLogsBySeason
tools.description: Game by game log of total team statistics.

tools.name: teams.teamsBySeason
tools.description: List of teams playing in a specified season.

tools.name: timeframes.getOperation
tools.description: Get detailed information about past, present, and future timeframes.

tools.name: upcomingSeason.seasonUpcoming
tools.description: Year of the current NFL season, if we are in the mid-season. If we are in the off-season, then year of the next upcoming season. This value changes immediately after the Super Bowl. The earliest season for Fantasy data is 2001. The earliest season for Team data is 1985.

tools.name: upcomingWeek.weekUpcoming
tools.description: Number of the current week of the NFL season. This value usually changes on Tuesday nights or Wednesday mornings at midnight ET.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
